<% local json = require "luci.jsonc" local backend = self.fileuni_backend or {} local host = backend.host or "" local port = backend.port or "19000" local config_path = backend.config_path or "/etc/fileuni/config.toml" local status_text = backend.status_text or "Unknown" local binary_text = backend.binary_text or "Unknown" local backend_hint = backend.backend_hint or ("http://:" .. port .. "/ui") local admin_reset_hint = backend.admin_reset_hint or "" local has_config = backend.has_config %>

<%:Backend Access%>

<%:Service status%>
<%= pcdata(status_text) %>
<%:CLI binary%>
<%= pcdata(binary_text) %>
<%:Config file%>
<%= pcdata(config_path) %>
<%:Detected backend%>
<%= pcdata(backend_hint) %>
<%:Config detected%>
<%= pcdata(has_config and "Yes" or "No, fallback port 19000 is used") %>
<%:This opens the FileUni web UI in a new browser tab using the port from config.toml.%>

<%= pcdata(admin_reset_hint) %>
